Go above and beyond with your patriotism when you show off this cape, and show everyone the true meaning and memories of being an American, grilling hotdogs, barbecuing burgers with friends, grow a garden, and launching fireworks, just make sure to keep them out of the dog's mouth! (Works in R6 and R15) 

Modeled and Textured by: Celisnix
